Overview
- Journeys undertaken for the purpose of Medical Treatment.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
- Journeys undertaken for the purpose of Medical Treatment.

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees applicable with effect from 01st June 2026 for Medical Treatment Visit is:

[Table:  Medical Treatment Visit]
 The above-mentioned Visa Fee should be paid in cash or by debit/credit card. 

## VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Latvian Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of Rs. 2987/- (inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%) payable in cash or by debit/credit card.

Please Note: 
- The applicable visa fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
Note: Children below the age of 6 years on the date of submission at VFS are exempted of the Visa Fee. However VFS service charges will be applicable. 

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/lva/travel-insurance)
Medical Treatment Checklist 

## Photo Specifications
Note: We regret we cannot accept photographs that do not meet these requirements
Please provide one recent photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, which should not have been used previously in the passport. The photograph should be in colour and:
- Taken against a light background (white or off-white) so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear share quality and with the face in focus.
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print).
- Full face, non-smiling [without sunglasses, a hat/cap or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background]
- Please stick the Photograph on the Visa Application Form.
Note: Please follow these instructions carefully. If photographs presented do not meet these requirements your application will be considered incomplete. A photo
                                                                            booth meeting these requirements is available at the centre.

## Processing Time
Please apply at least 2 weeks in advance and note that visa processing takes up to 10 working days. Please note that applications submitted to other VFS-offices than New Delhi will
                                                                            take another two days due to postal delivery.

## Download Forms
Online Application Form (https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/ApplicationMain.aspx)

visa_types.name: Short Stay Visa
visa_types.overview: If you are planning a short visit to Latvia and you do not have Latvian nationality, you may need to apply for a Schengen visa. Latvia is one of the 29 European countries forming the Schengen Area which have no border controls between them. These countries also issue a common visa, the Schengen visa.
visa_types.full_text: If you are planning a short visit to Latvia and you do not have Latvian nationality, you may need to apply for a Schengen visa. Latvia is one of the 29 European countries forming the Schengen Area which have no border controls between them. These countries also issue a common visa, the Schengen visa.

visa_types.name: Residence Permit
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/lva/travel-insurance).
Residence Permit Checklist 
List of documents for the visa application upon positive OCMA decision on Resident Permit is as follows –

- Long Stay Visa application form completed online, printed, and signed by the applicant.
- One photo (size 35mm x 45 mm) taken during visa submission-Live Photo.
- Passport with a period of validity extending at least three months after the intended date of departure from Latvia or other Member State and containing at least two blank pages. Copies of the identification pages and the pages that contain information about previously issued visas.
- Copy of OCMA Positive decision on granting residence permit rights.
- Flight itinerary indicating the intended Schengen area entry date.
- Travel insurance for 90 days starting with the Schengen area entry date.
- Visa fee of 90 EUR
visa_types.visa_fees:
Visa Fees applicable with effect from 01st June 2026 for Resident Permit Visa in India is:

[Table:  Residence Permit]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee should be paid in cash or by debit/credit card.
visa_types.processing_time:
According to the Immigration Law of Latvia, the visa processing time is 15 days after submission of all the stipulated documents. The documents are considered to be submitted when
                                                                            received at the Embassy from the VFS Global. If additional information or inspection is necessary for the issue of a long-stay visa, the decision shall be taken within 60 days.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Applicants applying for Residence permit purpose can apply their visa application through VFS.
Customer with positive OCMA decision can walk into the nearest visa application Centre, effective 1st July 2024.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applicants applying for Residence permit purpose can apply their visa application through VFS.
Customer with positive OCMA decision can walk into the nearest visa application Centre, effective 1st July 2024.

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees applicable with effect from 01st June 2026 for Resident Permit Visa in India is:

[Table:  Residence Permit]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee should be paid in cash or by debit/credit card.

## VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Latvian Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of Rs. 2987/- (inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%) payable in cash or by debit/credit card.
Please Note: 
- The applicable visa fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
- Video Conferencing would be Rs 3872/-

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/lva/travel-insurance).
Residence Permit Checklist 
List of documents for the visa application upon positive OCMA decision on Resident Permit is as follows –

- Long Stay Visa application form completed online, printed, and signed by the applicant.
- One photo (size 35mm x 45 mm) taken during visa submission-Live Photo.
- Passport with a period of validity extending at least three months after the intended date of departure from Latvia or other Member State and containing at least two blank pages. Copies of the identification pages and the pages that contain information about previously issued visas.
- Copy of OCMA Positive decision on granting residence permit rights.
- Flight itinerary indicating the intended Schengen area entry date.
- Travel insurance for 90 days starting with the Schengen area entry date.
- Visa fee of 90 EUR

## Photo Specifications
Applicant applying for Long term student visa there live photo will get captured at the Visa application center and the same will get pasted on the online application form. 

## Processing Time
According to the Immigration Law of Latvia, the visa processing time is 15 days after submission of all the stipulated documents. The documents are considered to be submitted when
                                                                            received at the Embassy from the VFS Global. If additional information or inspection is necessary for the issue of a long-stay visa, the decision shall be taken within 60 days.
                                                                        

## Download Forms
Online Application Form  (https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/ApplicationMain.aspx)

Student Visa Checklist

[Table:  Student Visa]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee should be paid in cash or by debit/credit card.
visa_types.processing_time: According to the Immigration Law of Latvia, the visa processing time is 15 days after submission of all the stipulated documents. The documents are considered to be submitted  when received at the Embassy from the VFS Global.                                                                            If additional information or inspection is necessary for the issue of a long-stay visa, the decision shall be taken within 60 days.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
According to the Immigration Law of Latvia, students from the third countries (except nationals of these countries (https://likumi.lv/about.php))
                                                                            who are enrolled into education institutions accredited in Latvia can apply for the long stay visa at the diplomatic and consular representations of Latvia in the third countries.
                                                                            After receiving a long stay visa (valid for 90 days), upon entering Latvia, students are subjected to apply for a residence permit at the Office of Citizenship and Migration Affairs
                                                                            of Latvia (OCMA).
Long stay visa submission procedure

- Applicants from India and Sri Lanka can schedule their appointment only after uploading documents on Hello Verify for verification, to upload the document please click on the
 
link (https://www.helloverify.com/)
. The applicants from Sri Lanka can book the appointment online from the website of Latvia Visa Application Centre in Sri Lanka
 
https://www.vfsglobal.com/Latvia/Sri-Lanka/ (https://www.vfsglobal.com/Latvia/Sri-Lanka/)
.

All student applicants needs to appear for an interview.
The days for visa interview & submission of visa documents will be as follows:
- Monday
- Tuesday
- Wednesday
- Thursday
- Friday
- Applicants are requested to check the operational day of the center before booking the appointment.
- Submit visa application at the nearest VFS Global Latvia Visa application center in India. Applicants applying across India will be called at respective VACs for an interview through video conferencing.
- VFS charges a service fee of INR 2987 and video conferencing fee of INR 3872 (If applicable) per application. All VFS’s charges are inclusive of Goods & Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%. As of the 9th of July 2018, the VFS charges (Service fee & video Conferencing fee, if applicable) have to be paid through contact center/online when scheduling an appointment to submit the application; without pre-payment of the VFS charges, you will not be able to secure an appointment. The VFS Service Fee and video conferencing fee is in principle non-refundable, even if you do not attend your appointment. For more information, please contact our helpline number: calling 022-67866025 or email to: info.latviain@vfshelpline.com (mailto:info.latviain@vfshelpline.com)”

- Please be informed the applicant applying for Long Term Student cases cannot apply again with the same invitation number, applicants are requested to kindly check the same before applying.
- General public is hereby notified that the customer who have initiated or completed the Hello verify process on and before 21st June 2022, they need to get in touch with VFS Helpdesk on 022-67866025 for the updated application URL for appointment scheduling of Long stay student visa.
- Hello verify can only be used once with the application, if the customer is reapplying customer need to re do the Hello verify process.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
According to the Immigration Law of Latvia, students from the third countries (except nationals of these countries (https://likumi.lv/about.php))
                                                                            who are enrolled into education institutions accredited in Latvia can apply for the long stay visa at the diplomatic and consular representations of Latvia in the third countries.
                                                                            After receiving a long stay visa (valid for 90 days), upon entering Latvia, students are subjected to apply for a residence permit at the Office of Citizenship and Migration Affairs
                                                                            of Latvia (OCMA).
Long stay visa submission procedure

- Applicants from India and Sri Lanka can schedule their appointment only after uploading documents on Hello Verify for verification, to upload the document please click on the
 
link (https://www.helloverify.com/)
. The applicants from Sri Lanka can book the appointment online from the website of Latvia Visa Application Centre in Sri Lanka
 
https://www.vfsglobal.com/Latvia/Sri-Lanka/ (https://www.vfsglobal.com/Latvia/Sri-Lanka/)
.

All student applicants needs to appear for an interview.
The days for visa interview & submission of visa documents will be as follows:
- Monday
- Tuesday
- Wednesday
- Thursday
- Friday
- Applicants are requested to check the operational day of the center before booking the appointment.
- Submit visa application at the nearest VFS Global Latvia Visa application center in India. Applicants applying across India will be called at respective VACs for an interview through video conferencing.
- VFS charges a service fee of INR 2987 and video conferencing fee of INR 3872 (If applicable) per application. All VFS’s charges are inclusive of Goods & Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%. As of the 9th of July 2018, the VFS charges (Service fee & video Conferencing fee, if applicable) have to be paid through contact center/online when scheduling an appointment to submit the application; without pre-payment of the VFS charges, you will not be able to secure an appointment. The VFS Service Fee and video conferencing fee is in principle non-refundable, even if you do not attend your appointment. For more information, please contact our helpline number: calling 022-67866025 or email to: info.latviain@vfshelpline.com (mailto:info.latviain@vfshelpline.com)”

- Please be informed the applicant applying for Long Term Student cases cannot apply again with the same invitation number, applicants are requested to kindly check the same before applying.
- General public is hereby notified that the customer who have initiated or completed the Hello verify process on and before 21st June 2022, they need to get in touch with VFS Helpdesk on 022-67866025 for the updated application URL for appointment scheduling of Long stay student visa.
- Hello verify can only be used once with the application, if the customer is reapplying customer need to re do the Hello verify process.

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees applicable with effect from 01st June 2026 for Student visa in India is:

[Table:  Student Visa]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee should be paid in cash or by debit/credit card.

## VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Latvian Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of Rs. 2987/- (inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%) payable in cash or by debit/credit card.
 
Please Note: 

- The applicable visa fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
- Video Conferencing would be Rs 3872/-
- All VFS’s charges are inclusive of Goods & Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%. As of the 9th of July 2018, the VFS charges (Service fee & video Conferencing fee, if applicable) have to be paid when scheduling an appointment to submit the application; without pre-payment of the VFS charges, you will not be able to secure an appointment. The VFS Service Fee and video conferencing fee is in principle non-refundable, even if you do not attend your appointment.
- Please be informed the applicant applying for Long Term Student cases cannot apply again with the same invitation number, applicants are requested to kindly check the same before applying.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/lva/travel-insurance)
Student Visa Checklist 

## Photo Specifications
Applicant applying for Long term student visa there live photo will get captured at the Visa application center and the same will get pasted on the online application form. 

## Processing Time
According to the Immigration Law of Latvia, the visa processing time is 15 days after submission of all the stipulated documents. The documents are considered to be submitted  when received at the Embassy from the VFS Global.                                                                            If additional information or inspection is necessary for the issue of a long-stay visa, the decision shall be taken within 60 days. 

## Download Forms
Online Application Form (https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/ApplicationMain.aspx)

Applicants applying at the Latvian Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of Rs. 2987/- (inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%) payable in cash or by debit/credit card.
visa_types.processing_time:
Please apply at least 2 weeks in advance and note that visa processing takes up to 10 working days. Please note that applications submitted to other VFS-offices than New Delhi will
                                                                            take another two days due to postal delivery.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Airport transit visa may be issued to stay in an international transit zone at the airport of Latvia for nationals of several countries who need to change an airplane at the airport
                                                                            of Latvia. In principle an airport transit visa allowing to stay in an international transit zone is required for citizens of Afghanistan, Bangladesh, Democratic Republic of Congo,
                                                                            Eritrea, Ethiopia, Ghana, Iran, Iraq, Nigeria, Pakistan, Somalia, Sri Lanka or foreigners holding travel documents issued by the aforementioned countries.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Airport transit visa may be issued to stay in an international transit zone at the airport of Latvia for nationals of several countries who need to change an airplane at the airport
                                                                            of Latvia. In principle an airport transit visa allowing to stay in an international transit zone is required for citizens of Afghanistan, Bangladesh, Democratic Republic of Congo,
                                                                            Eritrea, Ethiopia, Ghana, Iran, Iraq, Nigeria, Pakistan, Somalia, Sri Lanka or foreigners holding travel documents issued by the aforementioned countries.

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees applicable with effect from 01st June 2026 for Airport Transit is:

[Table:  Airport Transit ]

The above-mentioned Visa Fee should be paid in cash or by debit/credit card.

VFS Service charge:

Applicants applying at the Latvian Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of Rs. 2987/- (inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%) payable in cash or by debit/credit card. 

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/lva/travel-insurance)
Airport Transit Visa Checklist 

## Photo Specifications
Note: We regret we cannot accept photographs that do not meet these requirements
Please provide one recent photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, which should not have been used previously in the passport. The photograph should be in colour and:
- Taken against a light background (white or off-white) so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear share quality and with the face in focus.
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print).
- Full face, non-smiling [without sunglasses, a hat/cap or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background]
- Please stick the Photograph on the Visa Application Form.
Note: Please follow these instructions carefully. If photographs presented do not meet these requirements your application will be considered incomplete. A photo
                                                                            booth meeting these requirements is available at the centre.

## Processing Time
Please apply at least 2 weeks in advance and note that visa processing takes up to 10 working days. Please note that applications submitted to other VFS-offices than New Delhi will
                                                                            take another two days due to postal delivery.

## Download Forms
Online Application Form (https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/ApplicationMain.aspx)

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applicants visiting for Employment purpose needs to apply for Employment visa through VFS centers.
Customers are requested to provide the Hello verify completion receipt along with the rest of the documents.
Following is the Hello Verify Link (https://visa.helloverify.com/#/)

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees applicable with effect from 01st June 2026 for Employment visa in India is:

[Table:  Employment]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee should be paid in cash or by debit/credit card.

## VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Latvian Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of Rs. 2987/- (inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%) payable in cash or by debit/credit card.
 
Please Note: 

- The applicable visa fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
- Video Conferencing would be Rs 3872/-
- All VFS’s charges are inclusive of Goods & Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%. As of the 9th of July 2018, the VFS charges (Service fee & video Conferencing fee, if applicable) have to be paid when scheduling an appointment to submit the application; without pre-payment of the VFS charges, you will not be able to secure an appointment. The VFS Service Fee and video conferencing fee is in principle non-refundable, even if you do not attend your appointment.
- Please be informed the applicant applying for Long Term Student cases cannot apply again with the same invitation number, applicants are requested to kindly check the same before applying.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/lva/travel-insurance)
Employment Visa Checklist

## Photo Specifications
Applicant applying for Long term Employment visa there live photo will get captured at the Visa application center and the same will get pasted on the online application form.

## Processing Time
According to the Immigration Law of Latvia, the visa processing time is 15 days after submission of all the stipulated documents. The documents are considered to be submitted  when received at the Embassy from the VFS Global.                                                                            If additional information or inspection is necessary for the issue of a long-stay visa, the decision shall be taken within 60 days. 

## Download Forms
Online Application Form (https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/ApplicationMain.aspx)

- Full face, non-smiling [without sunglasses, a hat/cap or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background]
